steps.title: Count the first deposits
steps.content:
The first account gets $x$ dollars once each month for $12$ months, contributing
$$
12x
$$

steps.title: Count the second deposits
steps.content:
The second account gets $y$ dollars twice each month for $12$ months. That is $24$ deposits, contributing
$$
24y
$$

steps.title: Write the total
steps.content: The total deposited was $5{,}400$, so $$ 5{,}400=12x+24y $$ The answer is B.
